title: ornanthes parviflora
intro: Ornanthes parviflora, also known as the dwarf orris, is a flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Ornanthes parviflora include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of Ornanthes parviflora are typically made by infusing the roots in water or using them in a decoction, which can be consumed as a tea or used topically to treat skin conditions.
